details.heading: Ships in product packaging
details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. Learn more

item_specifications.special_feature: Adjustable Shoulder Strap, Airline Approved, Breathable, Durable, Expandable

about_item: AIRLINE APPROVED CARRIER - Pet carrier for dog cat is TSA approved and placed under the seat in the cabin, mainly designed for Delta Airlines, United Airlines, American Airlines, We suggest checking carrier size with the airline before traveling. Kindly note: pet size you carry be within 17"L x 10"W x 10"H (inner size) and weight recommended max load of 15 LBS small cats or dogs, Please refer to your pet's length and height to choose the size of the carrier

EXPANDABLE SPACE - Top-expandable designe Gaining more space to move around. It is easy for pets to stand and stretch, also creates a safe environment to avoid stress reactions anxiety while traveling
BETTER BREATHABILITY - The small dog cat carrier has breathable mesh on three sides for a breathable, wide-open view for your pet to look out and for you to view and communicate with your pet

MORE SAFELY - The pet carrier for dog cat is designed with upgraded structure of stainless steel and fiber rods, it is deformation or sagging, collapse and better stability. Zipper snap lock prevents pets from opening or scratching the zipper open

STURDY FABRIC - Comparison of similar products made of waterproof, non-toxic, scratch-resistant and wear-resistant new fabrics, mesh material has been upgraded to effectively prevent pets from tearing the mesh with their nails, preventing pets from falling out of the pet carrier for dog cat

Warmer After-sales Service - Lekereise provides exceptional after-sales support to ensure your satisfaction. We respond to your inquiries within 24 hours and provide quality problems within 12-month guarantee, So if you have any problems, please feel free to contact us

summary.text: Customers find the pet carrier to be of good quality and appreciate its roominess, with one mentioning it allows their Yorkie to stand up inside. The carrier is sturdy, with one customer noting their 13 lb pet fit well, and customers find it comfortable and functional for flying. While some customers like the pockets in the back, others mention there are no pockets at all. The zipper quality receives mixed feedback.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier to be of great quality, with one customer specifically mentioning it works well for small dogs.

examples.snippet: Very good quality! Sturdy, well made and it passed on Frontier Airlines so it's definitely meets Airline qualifications.
...It’s sturdy enough to fit my 13 lb pet. Great quality and enough pockets for leash and harness. Worth the price.
Good carrier. A+
This carrier is great as it allows room for my Yorkie to stand up!

insights.title: Roominess
insights.summary: Customers appreciate the carrier's roominess, as it fits under the seat with extra space at the top and accommodates pets up to 10 lbs, with one customer noting it allows their Yorkie to stand up.

examples.snippet: Lightweight and nice to have the extra room that pops up. Fit perfectly under the seat.
Vented and roomy
...I like the extra room at the top, the top and end openings, the pocket and the strap to hook it on my luggage handle....
Roomy enough for my large cat

insights.title: Sturdiness
insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier sturdy and stable, with one customer noting it's strong enough for safe travel, while another mentions their 13 lb pet fits comfortably inside.

examples.snippet: ...It offers ample mesh material for plenty of air and visibility. It is sturdy and very functional as a pet carrier for puppy, small dog or a cat.
...My 9 pound Shihpoo fur baby was very comfortable. He was able to stand and move around freely....
It is better than it looks. Comfy and well built
...The bottom is padded and very stable. The corners are firm, not floppy....

insights.title: Size
insights.summary: Customers appreciate the carrier's size, describing it as roomy with extra space that pops up, and one customer notes that the dimensions meet TSA requirements.

examples.snippet: Perfect size for air travel.
Good size well made
...The carrier was big enough for my 7.5 pound Maltipoo. I tried to make it comfy by adding a blanket over it and a thin blanket inside....
This carrier seems well made. The dimensions meet the TSA requirements....

insights.title: Functionality
insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier functional, with several mentioning it works well for their needs, and one customer noting it's perfect for flying.

examples.snippet: I have a 16 lb terrier and this carrier worked out great....
Perfect for flying! I used it to pick up my new puppy from out of state....
...It is sturdy and very functional as a pet carrier for puppy, small dog or a cat.
Well made, sturdy, flew with my dog with ease. It's lightweight too!

insights.title: Comfort
insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier comfortable, with one mentioning that the pop-up feature made their pet very comfortable.

examples.snippet: ...I tried to make it comfy by adding a blanket over it and a thin blanket inside. I like the expandable option and pockets in the back....
...when not under the seat you can easily provide the pet with room and comfort. It offers ample mesh material for plenty of air and visibility....
...my dog to the park in it so she could get used to it, and she seemed comfortable....
Comfortable

insights.title: Pockets
insights.summary: Customers have mixed opinions about the carrier's pockets, with some appreciating the back pockets while others note the absence of them.

examples.snippet: ...I like the pockets on the sides, the padded handle is sturdy and I haven't used the shoulder strap but I'm sure that's nice as well....
...The corners are firm, not floppy. Only down side is there is only 1 pouch on the side to store items in....
...I like the extra room at the top, the top and end openings, the pocket and the strap to hook it on my luggage handle....
...It has a little side pouch on it to hold some small items and was comfortable for me to carry him through the airport without worry....

insights.title: Zipper quality
insights.summary: Customers have mixed experiences with the carrier's zippers, with some finding them good quality, while others report issues with them getting stuck and the top not staying up well.

examples.snippet: ...She's able to curl up but not stretch out, a smaller or shorter in length dog would fit nicely....
The zipper keeps getting stuck.
...The zippers seem to be good quality and strong for safe travel.
...The top of the carrier pops up & I keep it up as long as I can for our dog to provide more space. I have to put it down when placed under the seat....

authors_reviews.title: Great Buy
authors_reviews.text: I purchased this for a last minute flight. My 9 pound Shihpoo fur baby was very comfortable. He was able to stand and move around freely. I unzipped the top and he sat comfortably while waiting to board. Once we did so he and this case fit with room under the seat. It also acts a great car seat. The Carrying strap is long enough to fit over the head rest, while the seat belt straps pass through the luggage straps on the carrier and keep it secure in the car. Well made, sturdy padding bottom inside. Overall it was a great buy.
authors_reviews.author: Necia Howell

authors_reviews.title: Works great
authors_reviews.text: Well made, sturdy, flew with my dog with ease. It's lightweight too!
authors_reviews.author: Keiratheexplorer

authors_reviews.title: Comfort and space
authors_reviews.text: It’s easy to fold and doesn’t take a lot of space when you’re not using it. My cat fitted perfectly. It fits good , easy to use , and it’s comfortable for your pet.
authors_reviews.author: Josue

authors_reviews.title: Very nice and sturdy carrier
authors_reviews.text: This carrier fits my 10 lb cheweenie just shy of being to small but does keep her safe and the mesh top allows her to get ample air and still able to view out. She's able to curl up but not stretch out, a smaller or shorter in length dog would fit nicely. I like the pockets on the sides, the padded handle is sturdy and I haven't used the shoulder strap but I'm sure that's nice as well. It seems to be sturdy enough to handle her scratching nails. I'm very happy with it. Quality is great, cleaning is super easy and the bottom padding easily velcros on and off .
authors_reviews.author: MRio

authors_reviews.title: What a Big & Wonderful Change
authors_reviews.text: Arrived on time & pack Great. Setting up is easy with no problems. Hand-held & shoulder strap feel Good. My Cat don't like her old carrier especially when I put her in it. This new one she surprise me & jump right into it. She even laid down in the carrier. She played inside the carrier & let me zip it up while she in it. She didn't want to come out the carrier. The pop up middle top view, is Awesome for my Cat to sit up with more top space. What a Big change my Girl Cat age 5 has done. I keep her other carrier downstairs(for years). This new one is right by my bed, for her to jump in. So far so Good, Thank You So Much.
authors_reviews.author: jackie

authors_reviews.title: Successful purchase
authors_reviews.text: This was my dogs first time flying and it went well. The carrier was big enough for my 7.5 pound Maltipoo. I tried to make it comfy by adding a blanket over it and a thin blanket inside. I like the expandable option and pockets in the back. Great quality for the price.I had no problems at the counter and they didn’t really even check the bag. I paid for the dog carrier and that was it. It was a smooth and easy experience.Note:unable to add videos but it went well.
authors_reviews.author: Sydnee

authors_reviews.title: Exactly as described
authors_reviews.text: I have a 16 lb terrier and this carrier worked out great. I like the extra room at the top, the top and end openings, the pocket and the strap to hook it on my luggage handle. I like the frame to give it structure, and it fit perfectly under the seat on our Southwest flight.
authors_reviews.author: Linda Robinson

other_countries_reviews.title: Buen producto , sin problema para viajar en avión
other_countries_reviews.text: Buen producto sin problema para viajar en avión
other_countries_reviews.author: Danae Fernandez
